GAMBLERMOD-DICE_PLACEHOLDER_POWER.descri: A die in the dice tray. At the start of each turn, the first die is removed and a new one is added.
GAMBLERMOD-DICE_PLACEHOLDER_POWER.smartD: A die with the value [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. At the start of each turn, the first die is removed and a new one is added.
GAMBLERMOD-DICE_PLACEHOLDER_POWER.title: DicePlaceholderPower
